tools.name: Lex.page
tools.description: A clean, Google Docs-style editor that uses AI to finish your sentences when you're stuck. Tracks your writing style so autocomplete sounds like you.

tools.name: Wordtune
tools.description: A "vibe-checker" for your sentences. Highlight a phrase and get 10 different ways to rewrite it—from "Corporate Professional" to "Casual."

tools.name: Jasper
tools.description: Enterprise-grade marketing tool with pre-built "recipes" to generate full blog posts, Facebook ads, and Google descriptions tailored for sales.

tools.name: Copy.ai
tools.description: Specialized in beating "Social Media Fatigue." Generates dozens of headlines, captions, and ad hooks in seconds from a simple product description.

tools.name: HuggingFace Write
tools.description: Open-source playground to test different AI "brains" (Llama, Mistral) for free to see which writes best for your specific needs.

tools.name: Rytr
tools.description: Budget-friendly "Pocket Assistant" highly specialized in short-form professional content like emails, job descriptions, and Google reviews.

tools.name: ShortlyAI
tools.description: Focuses on "Creative Continuation." Write one sentence, and it writes the next several paragraphs, perfectly mimicking your narrative flow.

tools.name: Hemingway Editor Plus
tools.description: Acts like a strict editor. Highlights passive voice and complex sentences, then uses AI to simplify them into punchy, direct English.

tools.name: Writesonic
tools.description: AI writer with real-time internet access. Pulls current facts from Google to write SEO-optimized articles that are factually up-to-date.

tools.name: QuillBot
tools.description: World-class paraphrasing tool. Takes messy or overly academic text and smooths it into readable content while checking for plagiarism.

tools.name: Sudowrite
tools.description: Secret weapon for fiction writers. Can "describe" a scene using all five senses to make creative stories more immersive.

tools.name: ContentAtScale
tools.description: Heavy-duty SEO engine. Takes a single keyword and produces a 2,500-word blog post designed to rank high on Google.

tools.name: Anyword
tools.description: Data-driven copywriting. Gives your marketing text a "Performance Score" predicting how well it will convert your audience.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.description: The industry leader for artistic image generation. Operates through Discord to create the most stunning, gallery-worthy AI artwork available.

tools.name: DALL-E 3
tools.description: OpenAI's image generator that excels at following complex instructions. Great at generating readable text inside images and logical object arrangements.

tools.name: Leonardo.ai
tools.description: Professional artistic workbench. Train the AI on your own images to maintain consistent style across your entire brand and projects.

tools.name: Adobe Firefly
tools.description: Adobe's integrated AI that generates commercially safe images. Perfect for businesses worried about copyright and legal issues.

tools.name: Canva AI
tools.description: Built directly into Canva. Create presentations, social posts, and logos from simple text prompts without switching apps.

tools.name: Stable Diffusion (SDXL)
tools.description: Open-source powerhouse. Run locally for unlimited free generations or use online services. The most flexible option with full control.

tools.name: Playground AI
tools.description: Combine real photos with AI generation. Erase parts of images and let AI fill them in with new content seamlessly.

tools.name: Ideogram
tools.description: Excels at typography. Generate logos and images with clean, readable text—something most AI image generators struggle with.

tools.name: Clipdrop
tools.description: Swiss Army knife for image editing. Relight photos, upscale resolution, remove backgrounds, and swap objects instantly.

tools.name: Remove.bg
tools.description: Single-purpose tool that removes backgrounds from photos in seconds. Perfect for product photos and profile pictures.

tools.name: Upscayl
tools.description: Open-source desktop app that upscales low-resolution images without losing quality. Turn blurry photos into crisp, high-res versions.

tools.name: Khroma
tools.description: AI color palette generator. Learn which colors you like, then generates infinite combinations for your brand or project.

tools.name: Recraft
tools.description: Generate vector graphics and 3D-style illustrations that scale infinitely. Perfect for logos and professional design work.

tools.name: Runway (Gen-3)

tools.name: HeyGen

tools.name: Synthesia
tools.description: Enterprise-grade avatar platform. Turn text into training videos with 230+ AI presenters speaking 140+ languages.

tools.name: Luma Dream Machine
tools.description: Create high-quality, realistic videos from text prompts or images. Known for smooth motion and coherent physics.

tools.name: Pika Labs
tools.description: Video editing with AI. Extend videos, add motion to images, and edit specific parts of footage with simple text commands.

tools.name: Kling AI

tools.name: CapCut
tools.description: Mobile-first video editor with AI features. Auto-captions, background removal, and one-click video effects for social content.

tools.name: Descript

tools.name: OpusClip

tools.name: Pictory
